zh.lifeSummary: 當Francis Chamberlain於1561年出生在英國賀特福爾霍亞德時，他的父親Robert Chamberlain32歲，母親Elizabeth Ruddocke28歲。他於1587年7月26日與Jone Conias在英國賀特福爾瓦爾可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1633年在英國艾可布拉德維爾--希亞享年72歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾瓦爾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Francis Chamberlain于1561年出生在英国賀特福爾霍亞德时，他的父亲Robert Chamberlain32岁，母亲Elizabeth Ruddocke28岁。他于1587年7月26日与Jone Conias在英国賀特福爾瓦爾可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1633年在英国艾可布拉德維爾--希亞享年72岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾瓦爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

variants.name: Chamberlin
meanings: French: occupational name for an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, from Old French chamberlenc ‘chamberlain’. See also Chamberlain and compare above.

variants.name: Chambers
meanings: from Middle English chaumbre ‘room (in a house); reception room in a palace or official building’ (Old French chambre). It is identical in implied function with the Chamberlain , which denoted an official: to pay in cameram was to pay into the exchequer, of which the camerarius or chamberer was in charge. The surname also applied to clerks employed there. As the office of Chamberlain rose in the social scale, this term remained reserved for more humble servants of the bedchamber or private quarters.
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Les Chambres, Manche (France).

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Italian Francesco , originally a vocabulary word meaning ‘French’ or ‘Frenchman’ (Late Latin Franciscus; compare Frank ). This was a nickname given to St Francis of Assisi ( 1181–1226 ) because of his wealthy father's business connections with France. His baptismal name was Giovanni . He had a pleasant, ordinary life as a child and young man, but after two serious illnesses, a period of military service, and a year as a prisoner of war in Perugia, he turned from the world and devoted himself to caring for the poor and sick. He was joined by groups of disciples, calling themselves ‘minor friars’ (friari minores). The main features of the Franciscan rule are humility, poverty, and love for all living creatures. The given name occurs occasionally in England as early as 1300 , and more frequently from the early 16th century, when there was a surge of admiration for, and imitation of, Italian Renaissance culture.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Francis Chamberlain was born in 1561, in Hormead, Hertfordshire, England, his father, Robert Chamberlain, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Ruddocke, was 28. He married Jone Conias on 26 July 1587, in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1633, in Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England, at the age of 72, and was buried in Walkern, Hertfordshire, England.

Il a épousé Jone Conias le 26 juillet 1587, à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1633, à Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Walkern, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Francis Chamberlainが1561年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアホールメアドで生まれた時，父Robert Chamberlainは32歳，母Elizabeth Ruddockeは28歳であった。1587年7月26日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンでJone Coniasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年にイギリスエセックスブラドウエル-オン-セアで72歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアウォーケルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Francis Chamberlain(이)가 1561년 영국 허트퍼드실르 호미드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Chamberlain(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Ruddocke(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1587년 7월 26일 영국 허트퍼드실르 워커에서 Jone Conias(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1633년 영국 에세스 브라드웰--시에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 워커에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Francis Chamberlain родился в 1561 г. в местности хаурмид, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Chamberlain было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Ruddocke, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Jone Conias 26 июля 1587 г. в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1633 г. в местности брадвелл-он-сеа, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности валкирн, хиртфордшир, Англия.
